name: timetracker-electron
description: TimeTracker desktop app (Electron shell around the web client)

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm run dev --prefix ../web" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron ."
scripts.build:web: cross-env ELECTRON=1 VITE_ELECTRON=true npm run build --prefix ../web
scripts.start: npm run build:web && cross-env NODE_ENV=production electron .
